series_metadata.series_title: Public Employment Risk Reduction Program (PERRP)/Health and Safety Records
series_metadata.series_description: Records include correspondence from the Ohio Bureau of Workers' Compensation, Public Employment Risk Reduction Program regarding inspections, violations, citations, corrective actions, complaints from various offices, quarterly safety reports from local offices, and Safety Consultant reports, and facilities inspections (Most documents are originals; some are copies).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: ; Paper: in office 3 years and 2 years in records center
